data.name: Information about how we process your data.
data.value: Information about how we process your data.

data.name: You have the right to information, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time.
data.value: You have the right to information, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time.

data.name: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This application (TicketsPlease) processes data solely for project management purposes.
data.value: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This application (TicketsPlease) processes data solely for project management purposes.

data.name: Our system uses a soft-delete mechanism. This means that deleted records remain in the database but are hidden from the UI unless explicitly purged (ADR 0120).
data.value: Our system uses a soft-delete mechanism. This means that deleted records remain in the database but are hidden from the UI unless explicitly purged (ADR 0120).

data.name: When using our ticket system, we store your username, email, and optionally your profile data. For audit reasons, we also store Geo/IP timestamps upon ticket creation (F1.6).
data.value: When using our ticket system, we store your username, email, and optionally your profile data. For audit reasons, we also store Geo/IP timestamps upon ticket creation (F1.6).
